purpose: Define the official fantasy and final-roster fields required before replacing proxy prices, draft rules, and preliminary roster assumptions.

source_policy.fallback_rule: Do not infer missing official fantasy values. If an official field is unavailable, keep it null and mark the row for review.
identity_priority: exact country plus normalized player name

validation_rules: official_fantasy_player_id must be unique when present.
official_price must be numeric or null; never fill a proxy value into official_price.
official_fantasy_position must be the official game position, not an inferred roster position.
Rows without a safe match to the current player pool must go to manual review.
Final squad status must come from FIFA, federation, or official tournament source text.
Players cut from final squads should remain auditable but must not be selectable by default.
Replacement players must preserve the source date and replacement note.
Official rules replace draft root fantasyRules.json only after scoring, squad, budget, and captain/substitution rules are present.
If official deadlines are missing, deadline fields stay null and decision tools must keep manual deadline warnings.
Rules must be regenerated into fantasyRulesData.js before browser validation.

non_goals: Do not create placeholder official prices.
Do not overwrite proxy_price_v1 until official_price coverage is validated.
Do not promote draft rules to official rules without source-backed scoring and deadline fields.
